iterations.label: harness diet + tune-up
iterations.goal: Negative-scope iteration. 28 uncovered rules 를 semantic cluster 단위로 재정의 + dogfood6~7 transcript retrospective 기반 S/A/B/C tier 분류 + B/C delete + Should→Must 단일방향 격상. Progressive MD Charter-first 재구조화 (§0 Charter file top + §1+ Extensions pointer). Critical bug triage (sprint-commit archive staging, auto-tag production 자기 검증 via artificial v1.4.1 bump, run-codex auto status-tick). Soft freeze posture 선언 + mode flag human/agent 2-value define-only (분기 로직은 iter-4+ defer).
iterations.summary: N1은 CLAUDE.md를 292→248 lines로 줄이고 `.vibe/audit/iter-3/{rule-audit-report,rules-deleted}.md` 산출물을 남겼다. N2는 archive staging fix, run-codex status tick, auto-tag `v1.4.1` production 자기 검증을 완료했다. N3는 Charter/Extensions 재구조화, mode flag define-only, soft freeze posture를 닫았으며 iter-3 누적 net LOC는 +150 이하 budget을 유지했다.

iterations.label: harness hardening (v1.4.0)
iterations.goal: dogfood7 /vibe-review 산출물을 흡수하여 하네스 수준 3 finding을 script gate로 승격 — Zod single-source, audit gates, sprint-planner rename, release tag automation, MD→script rule promotion.
iterations.summary: M-audit (bc8f90f): Zod schema single-source, preflight audit.overdue gate, vibe-audit-lightweight, v1.4.0 migration, 22 new tests. M-process-discipline (20a612e): planner.md → sprint-planner.md rename with explicit tools frontmatter, vibe-planner-skip-log CLI, preflight planner.presence check, trivial-rule semantic revision. M-harness-gates (4d9a002): sprint-commit harnessVersion auto-tag, harness-gaps.md schema+coverage, vibe-rule-audit scanning 28 MUST/반드시/금지 rules, audit-skipped-mode user directive with expiry. Total: 3 commits, 81 files touched (+4921/-1005), tests 154→196 pass / 0 fail / 1 skip, harnessVersion 1.3.1→1.4.0. Residual: 27 uncovered rules as next-iteration candidates; gap-review-catch-wiring-drift open (+3 sprints deadline).
